description: Deck has 22 slides — well above the ~10-slide 10-20-30 target.
suggested_fix: Merge related slides or move deep dives to appendix; aim for ~10 slides total.

description: Slide 1 uses images effectively to support the introduction.
suggested_fix: Keep pairing a strong visual with a short headline on opening slides.

description: Slide 4 has 13 objects — above the ≤6 limit.
suggested_fix: On slide 4, keep title + ≤3 bullets + one chart; delete or move the other shapes to notes.

description: Slide 11 has 19 text lines — too dense to scan.
suggested_fix: On slide 11, replace dense bullets with one headline + diagram; move detail to speaker notes.

description: Slide 11 uses font sizes below 30pt — below the 30pt minimum.
suggested_fix: Set body text on slide 11 to 30pt+; demote secondary lines to notes.

description: Slides build a clear narrative arc from problem to solution.
suggested_fix: Keep ordering slides as hook → problem → failed attempt → solution → takeaway.

description: Slide 6 puts detail on the slide that belongs in speaker notes.
suggested_fix: Leave a ≤5-word headline on slide 6; paste the full script into speaker notes only.
